title: epilobium glaberrimum subsp. fastigiatum
intro: Epilobium glaberrimum subsp. fastigiatum, also known as the alpine willowherb, is a plant species in the willowherb family (Onagraceae). It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Epilobium glaberrimum subsp. fastigiatum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and possibly aid in the treatment of certain types of cancer. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions with other medications.
